title: Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting
content: If your Wi-Fi drops repeatedly, first restart your router by unplugging it for 30 seconds. Forget the network on your device and reconnect. Update your wireless adapter drivers. If the issue persists on the 2.4GHz band, switch to 5GHz to avoid interference. Check for nearby devices that might cause interference like microwaves or cordless phones. Move the router to a central location and away from walls.

title: Printer not responding
content: When a printer shows offline, check that it is powered on and connected to the same network as your computer. Clear the print queue, then restart the print spooler service. Reinstall the printer driver if the device still does not appear. Verify the printer's IP address matches your network. Try printing a test page from the printer's settings menu. If wireless, move the printer closer to the router.

title: Computer running slowly
content: A slow computer is often caused by too many startup programs. Disable unnecessary startup apps in Task Manager. Check disk usage and free up space if the drive is over 90 percent full. Run a malware scan and ensure you have enough RAM for your workload. Close browser tabs and background applications. Check for disk errors using the CHKDSK utility. Update Windows and all drivers.

title: Cannot log in to account
content: If login fails, confirm Caps Lock is off and the password is correct. Use the password reset link if needed. Clear your browser cache and cookies. If you see a locked-account message, wait 15 minutes before retrying or contact support to unlock it. Try logging in from a different device. Disable browser extensions that might interfere with login.

title: VPN won't connect
content: For VPN connection failures, verify your internet works without the VPN first. Check that your credentials and server address are correct. Disable conflicting firewall rules, and try switching from UDP to TCP if the connection times out. Ensure your VPN client is up to date. Check if the VPN server is experiencing downtime. Try clearing VPN cache or reinstalling the client.
